user_prompt: want to run longer here are a few brain hacks

openai_plan.theme_description: You can push past limits with simple mindset tricks. Here are quick brain hacks to help you run further today

slides.caption: Want to run longer? Try these brain hacks next time you hit the pavement
slides.shot_direction: Wide shot of an empty running trail early morning, soft light, no runner in frame

slides.caption: 1. Break your run into small mental checkpoints, not miles
slides.shot_direction: Close-up of a runner’s wristwatch and hand tapping it, sunlight glinting off the watch

slides.caption: 2. Use positive self-talk to silence doubts before they start
slides.shot_direction: Mid-shot of a runner pausing, eyes closed, breathing deeply, hands on hips

slides.caption: 3. Focus on your breath, not the distance, to stay present and calm
slides.shot_direction: POV shot showing runner’s feet hitting the pavement steadily, ground texture visible

slides.caption: 4. Visualize the finish line like you already crossed it
slides.shot_direction: Blurred finish line banner in the distance, shot from behind a runner approaching

slides.caption: Your brain is your best running coach, trust it and keep going
slides.shot_direction: Hero shot of the runner smiling, catching breath on the trail, scenic background
